nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools are most useful for automating admin tasks, rather than as part of the creative process

nodes.label: AI's ability to produce human-like text
nodes.grounding_span: it's harder to get the necessary level of control over AI produced images than it is for text

nodes.label: AI as job threat
nodes.label_negative: AI as tool for skilled creatives
nodes.grounding_span: people are concerned that it will take jobs away from freelancers eventually

nodes.label: AI reliance on existing data vs human novelty
nodes.label_negative: AI ability to generate novel content
nodes.grounding_span: it necessarily has to rely on data that already exists, which makes me think it would struggle to come up with something new

nodes.label: AI as creative amplifier in VFX
nodes.label_negative: AI as replacement for human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI could be most useful in, as a new tool for skilled digital creatives to add to their arsenal, unlocking new creative opportunities

nodes.label: Creative time and energy
nodes.grounding_span: frees up more time to focus on creative work

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and human expression
nodes.grounding_span: capture the same unique creative perspective that a human could have

nodes.label: Professional accountability
nodes.grounding_span: If I'm going to send something out with my name on it I need to be happy that everything is exactly how I want it

nodes.label: Equitable access to creative careers
nodes.grounding_span: create a higher barrier for entry for people who want to learn those trades

nodes.label: Positive stance toward AI for administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools are most useful for automating admin tasks

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: They're not currently advanced enough to be really useful for script writing, on screen graphic design

nodes.label: Concern about job displacement
nodes.grounding_span: people are concerned that it will take jobs away from freelancers eventually

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's lack of novelty in design
nodes.grounding_span: it necessarily has to rely on data that already exists, which makes me think it would struggle to come up with something new

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI could be most useful in, as a new tool for skilled digital creatives to add to their arsenal

nodes.label: Task-dependent interaction style — iterative for creativity, delegative for admin
nodes.grounding_span: AI tools are most useful for automating admin tasks, rather than as part of the creative process

nodes.label: Future-oriented scenario thinking — envisions specific applications
nodes.grounding_span: I imagine that if a human VFX designer could use AI tools to automate some parts of the process
